segments.text: And going deep, like you said.
This is actually a very good start for Guto.
So far, besides game one, he's been fighting an uphill battle every single game.
So this must feel good for Guto.
To start off with a soldier.

full_text: And going deep, like you said. This is actually a very good start for Guto. So far, besides game one, he's been fighting an uphill battle every single game. So this must feel good for Guto. To start off with a soldier.
